testsuite.name: s2s.email

testcase.name: purchaseApi
testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- USD select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Routing applied → PSP: pxp, RouteTo: pxp_sandbox Amount Inputs → Min: 100.0, Max: 900.0, Provided: 569.0 ✅ Amount within valid range. Using exact value: 569.0 Generated First Name: john2a0 Purchase created successfully with ID: 6994640d69e2a855582b7620 Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment succeeded as expected Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 6994640d69e2a855582b7620 Clicked on Search button Clicked on Search button Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null

testcase.name: purchaseApi
testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- USD select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Routing applied → PSP: mantapay, RouteTo: mantapay-card Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 55.3 ✅ Amount within valid range. Using exact value: 55.3 Generated First Name: johna73 Purchase created successfully with ID: 699463c469e2a855582b728f Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment succeeded as expected Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 699463c469e2a855582b728f Clicked on Search button Clicked on Search button Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null

testsuite.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- USD select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Routing applied → PSP: mantapay, RouteTo: mantapay-card Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 55.3 ✅ Amount within valid range.
